item.name: Reef Squid
item.description:
A cephalopod that lays its eggs on the Ruby Sea's rocky reefs.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Though these wavekin's migration pattern covers most Far Eastern waters, it is to the Ruby Sea's rocky reefs that they return to deposit their eggs. Relatively average as far as stature is concerned, reef squid typically grow to two fulms at the longest.
